message:
feat(pt-core): add sha2 and hex dependencies for user_intent module

The user_intent.rs module requires sha2 and hex for hashing operations.
Added these dependencies to enable compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,8 @@ thiserror = "1"
 dirs = "5"
 libc = "0.2"
 regex = "1"
+sha2 = "0.10"
+hex = "0.4"
 
 # Structured logging
 tracing = "0.1"
